form.formComment: Last start 8th (Sr1) over 1690m at Kilmore, beaten 30 m by Janiebquick (2:03.30) in NR 45 to 48 on April 2 at $14. At the start before 10th (Fr4) over 2150m after showing early speed at Bendigo beaten 20 m by The Golden Hook (2:35.90) in NR 47 to 51 on March 25 at $34. Draws the inside so worth another chance.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Sr3) over 2150m at Bendigo was 2nd-1.75 at the bell, beaten a neck by Miss Piggy Wiggy (2:39.40) in NR up to 45 on April 8 at $12. Before that, 8th (Fr2) over 1750m after showing early speed at Swan Hill was 4th-7.4 at the bell, beaten 13 m by Happenstbabeachboy (2:06.10) in NR 45 to 50 on March 31 at $26. One of the top chances.

form.formComment: Backing up quickly since being well beaten Bendigo over 1650m, 6 days ago before that was well back in the run when 7th (Fr7) over 2150m at Bendigo beaten 45 m by Insider Trading (2:36.70) in NR up to 50 on April 1 at $13. Not keen on his chances in this line-up.

form.formComment: Fair run when beaten by 6 m finishing second after showing early speed, behind Metro Memory at Kilmore over 2180m in a NR 46 to 49 on March 26 at $5.50. Then a handy effort when beaten by 1.75 m finishing second after a quick start, behind Elated at Bendigo over 1650m in a NR 46 to 51 on April 8 at $1.90. Sure to play a major role.
